entries.name: Mt. Pulaski Courthouse State Historic Site
entries.description: Enjoy warm refreshments, festive treats, and Christmas decor.

entries.name: Salt Creek Crafters – American Legion Home
entries.description: Crafts, antiques, florals, clothing, soaps, candles, jewelry, Pampered Chef, wood, and holiday goods.

entries.name: Boy Scout Troop 122
entries.description: Fresh hot pork chop sandwiches.

entries.name: Mt. Pulaski High School
entries.description: 60+ vendors, crafts, homemade goods, and direct market sales.

entries.name: Vinegar Hill Treasure Chest
entries.description: Antiques, repurposed furniture, wood crafts, vintage, handmade, and miscellaneous goods.

entries.name: Topper’s Storage – Complete Storage Solutions
entries.description: Large indoor shopping with Christmas decor, gifts, and multiple food trucks.

entries.name: The Crafty Corner
entries.description: Hats, ear warmers, miniatures, baked goods, and scrubbies.

entries.name: Mt. Pulaski Public Library
entries.description: Annual book sale. Free donuts and hot drinks.

entries.name: Mt. Pulaski Township Historical Museum
entries.description: Bake sale and gently used Christmas items for sale.

entries.name: Red Ribbon Christmas
entries.description: Christmas, Thanksgiving, and Americana crafts and items.

entries.name: Daily Wrap
entries.description: Breakfast and lunch wraps, plus fresh and fried sides.

entries.name: Mt. Pulaski Grade School
entries.description: 60+ vendors, cookie walk, walking tacos, sloppy joes, and hot dogs.

entries.name: Mt. Pulaski Cafe
entries.description: Breakfast, lunch, and dinner served all day.

entries.name: We Three Sweets
entries.description: Hot chocolate, homemade marshmallows, hot cider, cinnamon rolls, and sweet treats.

entries.name: Zion Lutheran Church
entries.description: Soup and sandwiches plus vendors.

entries.name: Mt. Pulaski Courthouse Gazebo
entries.description: Gazebo decorated for a Christmas photo opportunity.

entries.name: Johnson’s True Value Hardware
entries.description: Retail full-line hardware store with Christmas decor and holiday lighting.

entries.name: Davis Dairy Bar, Inc.
entries.description: Mini donuts 8 AM–10:30 AM and a limited menu 11 AM–4 PM.

entries.name: St. Thomas Aquinas Church
entries.description: Pancakes, sausage, biscuits and gravy, drinks, and a bake sale.

entries.name: Annette Hahn Memorial
entries.description: In loving memory of Annette, a longtime Christmas on Vinegar Hill board member; gone but not forgotten.

entries.name: The Next Stop Saloon
entries.description: Special holiday drinks, cold beer, pizza, and gaming.

entries.name: Boomer’s BBQ
entries.description: Brisket, pork, nachos, fries, wings, and more.

entries.name: Market on the Hill
entries.description: Sandwiches, soup, baked treats, iced lattes, coffee, crafts, and more.

entries.name: Pizza Man – Photo Op
entries.description: Fence decorated for a Christmas photo opportunity.

entries.name: Loo’s Sugar Buzz
entries.description: Coffees, dirty drinks, lemonade shake-ups, and sweet tea.

entries.name: Chestnut Fire Dept.
entries.description: Crafts, bake sale, jewelry, and more.

entries.name: Elkhart Station General Store
entries.description: General store with Illinois products and wine tastings.

entries.name: The Talk of the Town
entries.description: Restaurant and bar with good food and good drinks.

entries.name: BB’s BFE Bar & Grill
entries.description: Restaurant and bar with hot food, cold drinks, and vendors.

callouts.treeSign: Look for the tree sign for participating locations.
callouts.bagNotice: Visit a location with the bag symbol and receive a reusable shopping bag with any donation to the 2026 Christmas on Vinegar Hill event while supplies last.
callouts.scanText: Scan for Google Map of Event
callouts.thankYouText: Thank you for your patronage and to our Christmas on Vinegar Hill grant benefactors:
benefactors: Mt. Pulaski Economic Development & Planning Board
Community Foundation for the Land of Lincoln
sponsors: Land & Home Real Estate & Property Management
footer: click on “In Our Community” then “Christmas on Vinegar Hill”
